response.step_by_step_log: Video starts with a waiting screen from 00:00 to 02:17, which does not contain the main performance. At 02:18, the song 'ちょこせんせーしょん' begins on stage. On-screen text identified the song title 'ちょこせんせーしょん' and composer/lyricist '周防パトラ'. The performer is identified as '癒月ちょこ' based on the channel/context. A search was conducted for ' "ちょこせんせーしょん" 周防パトラ Japanese and English lyrics '. While the song was found, the full lyrics were not extractable from the search summaries, so the lyrics fields are set to null as requested.
response.global_summary: This video is a live performance recording featuring an introductory waiting screen followed by a complete performance of the song "Choco-sensation" (ちょこせんせーしょん) by the virtual YouTuber Yuzuki Choco on a virtual stage.

scenes.description: A static waiting screen featuring a mascot character and text 'Strawberry & Milk'.
Performance of the song 'Choco-sensation' by Yuzuki Choco on a virtual stage. Title and credits appear on-screen.
scenes.song_title: ちょこせんせーしょん
